text: The candidate explained concepts clearly and stayed confident while solving technical questions.
Communication was weak, answers were vague, and confidence dropped during follow-up questions.
Strong technical understanding but the delivery was rushed and slightly unclear.
The student was polite and structured, but lacked depth in distributed systems and ML topics.
Good confidence level, concise responses, and solid technical fundamentals across most answers.
The response quality was inconsistent, communication needed clarity, and technical accuracy was low.
Excellent communication, calm tone, and thoughtful examples demonstrated strong confidence.
The student hesitated often, used filler words, and could not justify technical design choices.
Average communication, reasonable technical answers, but confidence can improve under pressure.
The interview performance was technically sound, though communication structure and confidence need work.
